data.instruction: The 'introduction' field must be a multi-sentence professional paragraph. Currently, it is only a single sentence. Expand it to provide more context and detail regarding the framework's objectives and applicability.
The top-level 'purpose' field must be a multi-sentence professional paragraph. Expand this to detail the strategic intent and expected outcomes of the framework.
All 'description' and 'purpose' fields within 'process_steps' must be multi-sentence professional paragraphs. Currently, they are single sentences. Provide more operational detail for each step.

Stakeholder responsibilities must be detailed lists. Currently, most stakeholders have only a single, high-level responsibility. Expand these into comprehensive lists of specific duties within the framework.
